ErrorResponse.description:
Standard error envelope returned by the signing endpoint when a request
fails validation or an upstream dependency errors. The shape is
intentionally minimal: a single human-readable string ErrorResponse.Error field.

error.description: A human-readable description of what went wrong.

OverlayType.description: The type of overlay to render onto a PDF page.

SignPdfRequest.description:
Request body for the `POST /api/sign` endpoint. Contains a base PDF
and a collection of overlay instructions describing how signature elements
should be rendered onto the document.

basePdfBase64.description: The base PDF document to apply overlays to, encoded as a base64 string.

overlays.description:
One or more overlay instructions to render onto the PDF. Overlays are
applied in the order supplied, which determines their z-order.

SignPdfResponse.description:
Successful response from `POST /api/sign`. Contains a short-lived
presigned URL that the caller can use to download the completed PDF
directly from AWS S3.

downloadUrl.description:
A presigned HTTPS URL pointing to the rendered PDF in S3. This URL is
time-limited and grants `GET` access only. Anyone holding the URL
can download the document until it expires.

expiresAtUtc.description:
UTC timestamp at which DownloadUrl stops being valid.
The TTL is controlled by the `PRESIGNED_URL_TTL_MINUTES` environment
variable and defaults to 60 minutes.

SignatureOverlay.description: A single overlay element to render at a specific location on a PDF page.

fontFamily.description:
Optional font family to use for text overlays. Defaults to
`Helvetica`. Only standard PDF font names are guaranteed to work
across environments (`Helvetica`, `Times-Roman`, `Courier`,
and their bold/italic variants).

fontSize.description: Optional font size in PDF points. Defaults to `12`.

height.description: Height of the overlay bounding box in PDF points. Must be greater than zero.

imageBase64.description:
Required when OverlayType SignatureOverlay.Type is OverlayType.SignatureImage.
A base64-encoded PNG or JPEG image. Ignored for other overlay types.

pageNumber.description: The 1-based page number in the base PDF to apply this overlay to.

text.description:
Required when OverlayType SignatureOverlay.Type is OverlayType.Text. For
OverlayType.DateStamp this is an optional custom
DateTime format string (defaults to `MM/dd/yyyy`).
Ignored for OverlayType.SignatureImage.

type.description:
The kind of overlay to render. Determines which of
string? SignatureOverlay.Text or string? SignatureOverlay.ImageBase64 is required.

width.description: Width of the overlay bounding box in PDF points. Must be greater than zero.

x.description: Horizontal position in PDF points, measured from the left edge of the page.

y.description: Vertical position in PDF points, measured from the bottom edge of the page.

get.description: Returns the service name and a static running status. Useful for quick sanity checks.

post.description:
Accepts a base64-encoded PDF and a list of overlay instructions
(signature images, text, date stamps). The service composites the
overlays onto the document using iText, uploads the result to AWS S3,
and returns a short-lived presigned HTTPS URL the caller can use to
download the signed PDF. The service performs NO cryptographic
signing — all signature data is supplied externally.

requestBody.description: Cancellation token for the HTTP request.

post.summary: Render signature overlays onto a PDF and return a presigned download URL.
